methodology: All values computed from FIXED seeds/inputs by the reference crate. Ed25519 is deterministic (RFC 8032); BLAKE3 and CBOR are deterministic. Non-deterministic ops (HPKE ephemeral, keygen) are excluded; their deterministic sub-operations are vectored. CBOR here is the §18 canonical, INTEGER-KEYED (COSE/CWT-style) deterministic encoding (RFC 8949 §4.2, spec §18.1.1/§18.1.2/§18.3.x); signing preimages and content addresses follow §18.9. A second implementer following §18 alone reproduces these bytes.

vectors.name: content_address_empty
vectors.note: empty input

vectors.name: content_address_small
vectors.note: 5-byte ASCII input

vectors.name: content_address_phrase
vectors.note: human-readable phrase

vectors.name: content_address_multi_kib
vectors.note: 4096-byte deterministic input, byte[i]=(i*37+11)&0xff

vectors.name: keyname_zero_key
vectors.note: all-zero 32-byte key

vectors.name: keyname_key_ones
vectors.note: all-0x01 key (distinct from below)

vectors.name: keyname_key_twos
vectors.note: all-0x02 key (distinct from above → different name)

vectors.name: keyname_real_pubkey
vectors.note: key-name of the Ed25519 public key derived from seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: keyname_typo_rejected
vectors.note: a single mistyped word must fail the folded checksum (fail closed)

vectors.name: safety_number_pair_ab
vectors.note: safety number of the (seed 0x11, seed 0x22) identity-key pair

vectors.name: safety_number_order_independent
vectors.note: same pair, keys swapped → MUST equal safety_number_pair_ab (order-independent)

vectors.name: ed25519_rfc8032_test1
vectors.note: RFC 8032 §7.1 Test 1 cross-check (empty domain, empty message)

vectors.name: ed25519_rfc8032_test2
vectors.note: RFC 8032 §7.1 Test 2 cross-check (empty domain, 1-byte message 0x72)

vectors.name: ed25519_domain_separated
vectors.note: Ed25519 over (domain || msg) — how dmtap-core signs (sign_domain)

vectors.name: ed25519_verify_ok
vectors.note: the signature above MUST verify

vectors.name: ed25519_verify_tampered_msg
vectors.note: flipping one message bit MUST fail verification (fail closed)

vectors.name: ed25519_verify_tampered_sig
vectors.note: flipping one signature bit MUST fail verification (fail closed)

vectors.name: cbor_identity

input.note: created via Identity::create_classical, seed 0x11*32, version 0; §18.4.1 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a signed single-suite Identity; also its §18.9.4 content address

vectors.name: cbor_device_cert

input.note: IK seed 0x11*32 signs device key seed 0x22*32; §18.4.2 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of an IK-signed DeviceCert

vectors.name: cbor_payload

input.note: fixed fields; sig is a fixed 64-byte placeholder; §18.3.5 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a MOTE Payload

vectors.name: cbor_envelope

input.note: fixed ciphertext (48 bytes) + fixed sig placeholders; to = KeyTag; id = content address of ciphertext; §18.3.1 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a MOTE Envelope; round-trip-checked in the self-test

vectors.name: suite_reject_0x00
vectors.note: an unregistered suite byte MUST fail to decode (never guess; fail closed)

vectors.name: suite_reject_0x04
vectors.note: an unregistered suite byte MUST fail to decode (never guess; fail closed)

vectors.name: suite_reject_0x05
vectors.note: an unregistered suite byte MUST fail to decode (never guess; fail closed)

vectors.name: suite_reject_0xff
vectors.note: an unregistered suite byte MUST fail to decode (never guess; fail closed)

vectors.name: suite_accept_0x01
vectors.note: 0x01 (classical), 0x02 (reserved PQ), and 0x03 (reserved AEAD-diverse) are known suite ids and decode

vectors.name: suite_accept_0x02
vectors.note: 0x01 (classical), 0x02 (reserved PQ), and 0x03 (reserved AEAD-diverse) are known suite ids and decode

vectors.name: suite_accept_0x03
vectors.note: 0x01 (classical), 0x02 (reserved PQ), and 0x03 (reserved AEAD-diverse) are known suite ids and decode

vectors.name: mote_content_address_ok
vectors.note: id MUST equal the content address of the ciphertext (checked before decryption)

vectors.name: mote_content_address_tampered
vectors.note: a tampered ciphertext MUST fail the content-address check (drop before decrypt)

vectors.name: mote_sender_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.1 sender_sig body = id||det_cbor(to)||ts_be64||kind||0xf6 (challenge absent); DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/envelope-sender\0'; ephemeral key seed 0x33*32

vectors.name: mote_sender_sig_verify
vectors.note: the sender_sig above MUST verify under the ephemeral key (sender_key, §18.3.1 key 12)

vectors.name: mote_payload_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.2 payload signature: BLAKE3-256(det_cbor(Payload ∖ {sig}) ‖ u8(kind) ‖ u64be(ts) ‖ det_cbor(to)) under DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/payload\0'; IK seed 0x11*32; kind/ts/to from the fixed envelope

vectors.name: cbor_mix_descriptor

input.note: node_ik seed 0x11*32; one MixKeyEntry (epoch 42); layer 0; §18.5.2 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of an IK-signed MixNodeDescriptor

vectors.name: mix_descriptor_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.9 MixNodeDescriptor.sig: DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/mix-descriptor\0' ‖ det_cbor(descriptor ∖ {7}); node_ik seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: mix_descriptor_sig_verify
vectors.note: the MixNodeDescriptor signature above MUST verify under node_ik (§18.5.2 key 2)

vectors.name: cbor_mix_directory

input.note: authority seed 0x33*32; two independently-signed MixNodeDescriptors (layers 0,1); §18.5.3 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of an authority-signed MixDirectory

vectors.name: mix_directory_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.9 MixDirectory.sig: DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/mix-directory\0' ‖ det_cbor(directory ∖ {8}); authority seed 0x33*32

vectors.name: mix_directory_sig_verify
vectors.note: the MixDirectory signature above MUST verify under the pinned authority (§18.5.3 key 2)

vectors.name: cbor_domain_directory

input.note: authority seed 0x11*32; two DirEntry (sovereign + org-managed); §18.4.7 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of an authority-signed DomainDirectory

vectors.name: domain_directory_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.3 DomainDirectory.sig: DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/domain-directory\0' ‖ det_cbor(directory ∖ {9}); authority seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: domain_directory_sig_verify
vectors.note: the DomainDirectory signature above MUST verify under the pinned domain authority (§18.4.7 key 3)

vectors.name: cbor_deniable_prekey_bundle

input.note: ik seed 0x11*32; idk = 0xcd*32 (key 11) certified by idk_sig (key 12); spk = 0xab*32; two one-time prekeys; §18.4.8 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a device-signed DeniablePrekeyBundle (hardened: dedicated idk DH key, XEdDSA-from-IK dropped)

vectors.name: deniable_idk_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.10 DeniablePrekeyBundle.idk_sig (== DeniableInit.idk_a_cert): DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/deniable-idk\0' ‖ raw idk (field 11); device seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: deniable_idk_sig_verify
vectors.note: the idk certification above MUST verify under ik (§18.4.8 key 2)

vectors.name: deniable_spk_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.10 DeniablePrekeyBundle.spk_sig: DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/deniable-spk\0' ‖ raw spk (field 3); device seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: deniable_prekeys_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.10 DeniablePrekeyBundle.sig: DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/deniable-prekeys\0' ‖ det_cbor(bundle ∖ {10}); device seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: deniable_prekeys_sig_verify
vectors.note: the DeniablePrekeyBundle body signature above MUST verify under ik (§18.4.8 key 2)

vectors.name: cbor_deniable_message

input.note: DeniableMessage (disc 2): dh=0x09*32, pn=0, n=5; NO signature; §18.3.9 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a deniable subsequent-message frame (auth = ratchet MAC, no sig)

vectors.name: cbor_deniable_init

input.note: DeniableInit (disc 1): ik_a seed 0x11*32, idk_a = 0x44*32 (key 9) + idk_a_cert (key 10), embeds the DeniableMessage; NO content signature; §18.3.9 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a deniable X3DH first-message frame (auth = ratchet MAC, no content sig; idk_a is the DH input, ik_a only AD-binds)

vectors.name: cbor_deniable_payload

input.note: from seed 0x11*32; key 2 is the real content kind (chat), NOT a sig; §18.3.10 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a DeniablePayload; a smuggled signature MUST be rejected (§18.3.10)

vectors.name: cbor_manifest

input.note: 3 ordered chunk hashes; id = §18.9.5 Merkle root; forbidden key 5 absent; §18.3.8 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a swarm-distributed file Manifest

vectors.name: manifest_root
vectors.note: §18.9.5 Manifest.id = 0x1e ‖ MTH(chunks): leaf=BLAKE3(0x00‖h), node=BLAKE3(0x01‖l‖r), RFC 6962 split, 3 chunks

vectors.name: cbor_signed_tree_head

input.note: log_id seed 0x11*32; tree_size 7; root = content-addr of 'kt-merkle-root'; §18.4.9 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of a log-signed SignedTreeHead (KT STH, RFC-6962 profile)

vectors.name: kt_sth_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.13 SignedTreeHead.sig: DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/kt-sth\0' ‖ det_cbor(STH ∖ {6}); signed by log_id seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: kt_sth_sig_verify
vectors.note: the STH signature above MUST verify under the pinned log_id (§18.4.9 key 2)

vectors.name: kt_identity_leaf_hash
vectors.note: §18.4.9 leaf_hash = 0x1e ‖ BLAKE3-256(0x00 ‖ det_cbor([name, ik, version, identity_id])); RFC-6962 leaf prefix 0x00

vectors.name: cbor_inclusion_proof
vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of an RFC-6962 InclusionProof (audit path)

vectors.name: cbor_consistency_proof
vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of an RFC-6962 ConsistencyProof

vectors.name: cbor_capability_token

input.note: iss seed 0x11*32 → aud seed 0x22*32; two caps (one with caveats); prnt present; §18.7.3 integer-keyed (UCAN v1.0 profile)

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of an iss-signed CapabilityToken

vectors.name: cap_token_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.14 CapabilityToken.sig: DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/cap-token\0' ‖ det_cbor(token ∖ {9}); iss seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: cap_token_sig_verify
vectors.note: the CapabilityToken signature above MUST verify under iss (§18.7.3 key 2)

vectors.name: cbor_capability_revocation

input.note: iss seed 0x11*32 revokes content-addr of 'revoked-capability-token'; §18.7.3 integer-keyed

vectors.note: §18-canonical integer-keyed CBOR of an iss-signed CapabilityRevocation

vectors.name: cap_revocation_sig
vectors.note: §18.9.14 CapabilityRevocation.sig: DS-tag 'DMTAP-v0/cap-revocation\0' ‖ det_cbor(revocation ∖ {5}); iss seed 0x11*32

vectors.name: sphinx_routing_command
vectors.note: §18.5.4 RoutingCommand: 48 B = cmd(1) ‖ flags(1) ‖ delay_ms(4,BE) ‖ next_hop(32) ‖ reserved(10=0)

vectors.name: sphinx_surb
vectors.note: §18.5.4 SURB: 352 B = first_hop(32) ‖ header(288 = α‖β‖γ) ‖ key_seed(32)

vectors.name: sphinx_fragment_header
vectors.note: §18.5.4 SphinxFragmentHeader: 16 B = msg_id(8) ‖ frag_index(2,BE) ‖ frag_count(2,BE) ‖ total_len(4,BE)
